candidates.why: This is a COGS-related amortization component, but it appears to be a sub-component of the already selected parent COGS bucket because 'Cost of Operating Revenue' reconciles with the detailed cost lines including depreciation/amortization and 'Cost of Revenues - Other - Total'. Adding it separately would double count.

This is a COGS-related depreciation component, but it appears to sit within the already selected 'Cost of Operating Revenue' row rather than outside it. The selected COGS row behaves like the total cost bucket that includes this component, so it should not be added separately.

variables.notes: The selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of Operating Revenue'. The detailed rows beneath it indicate depreciation and amortization are embedded within that selected COGS amount, so no separate COGS D&A row should be added.
